name: Bob Hammer
abstract: Howard Robert Hammer (March 3, 1930 – December 26, 2021) was an American jazz pianist, composer and arranger.

about_quotes.speaker: William Randolph "Cozy" Cole
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewer mentions Bob Hammer in the context of a recording session ('Bob Hammer on piano'), but the interviewee (Cozy Cole) does not respond with any personal anecdote, confirmation of working together, or personal relationship.
